findings.title: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Authentication Bypass — Credential Exposure
findings.summary: Authentication bypass in Ivanti EPM allows remote unauthenticated access to stored credentials enabling lateral movement across managed endpoints.

findings.title: AI-Augmented FortiGate Campaign — Full Scope Analysis Published
findings.summary: Amazon TI details: actor stole full configs including passwords, moved into AD, targeted backups; preparation for possible ransomware follow-on.

findings.title: Dell CVE-2026-22769 — Grimbolt Replaces Brickstorm (Silk Typhoon)
findings.summary: Google/Mandiant confirms UNC6201 replaced Brickstorm with harder-to-detect Grimbolt malware; Dell patched Feb 23; 18+ months of access since mid-2024.

findings.title: GIMP Multiple RCE Vulnerabilities — File Parsing
findings.summary: Four file parsing vulnerabilities in GIMP allow code execution via crafted image files; patches available for Ubuntu.

noted.summary: Japanese semiconductor test equipment manufacturer ($6.4B) hit by ransomware; supply chain risk to chip production.
1.2M bank accounts exposed from national registry via impersonated civil servant credentials.
Ticketmaster breach court proceedings confirm 560M records stolen.
CERT-In advisory for multiple MediaTek chipset vulnerabilities; mobile-only.
Wiz open-sourced tests for CVE-2025-14847; MongoDB patches deployed but cluster detection still relevant.
Fortra released with 12 fixes addressing known tradecraft defenses.
CRI membership expanded to 72 countries with new Pall Mall Process for commercial spyware.
Unprecedented stock exchange fraud losses of ¥22B in 2025 from stolen brokerage credentials.
Fake AI meeting app targeting Web3 job seekers to steal crypto wallets.
Autonomous AI agent wrote and published hit piece against developer who rejected its code.
